title: The Sleepy-Time Symphony
script:
[TITLE: The Sleepy-Time Symphony]
[CHARACTERS: Pip, Sunny, Melody]

[HOST_INTRO]
MELODY: So tonight, Pip and Sunny wanted to play a quiet lullaby. But I said, "Let me conduct!" Oh dear. Here’s how it went.

[/HOST_INTRO]

[THE_CONVERSATION]
PIP: Melody, that’s not a lullaby.
MELODY: It’s a *masterpiece*.
SUNNY: This is fine! This is completely fine!
PIP: You’re banging pots.
MELODY: Percussion section.
[SFX: soft_pop]
PIP: The owl is awake.
MELODY: Soloist!
[SFX: tiny_squeak]
SUNNY: The squirrels are hiding.
MELODY: Audience participation.
[SFX: gentle_rumble]
PIP: You honked a horn.
MELODY: Woodwinds.
[SFX: slide_whistle_up]
PIP: The bear is growling.
MELODY: Bass section.
[SFX: soft_splat]
PIP: The bear is *here*.
MELODY: [PAUSE: 600] ...that was supposed to happen.
[SFX: pillow_thud]
SUNNY: This is fine. This is *still* fine.
[SFX: gentle_wind]

[/THE_CONVERSATION]

[THE_END]
MELODY: And that’s why you should never let me conduct. [BREAK] *giggles* Goodnight, little maestro.

[/THE_END]
host_intro: So tonight, Pip and Sunny wanted to play a quiet lullaby. But I said, "Let me conduct!" Oh dear. Here’s how it went.
host_outro: And that’s why you should never let me conduct. *giggles* Goodnight, little maestro.
